title: grona muelleri
intro: Grona muelleri, also known as Grona, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It is a small tree or shrub native to New Caledonia, and its leaves and stems are rich in essential oils with medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Grona muelleri include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Grona muelleri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches, among other health benefits.
